git -C *.suggestion: Run git commands from the target directory directly instead of using `git -C`.

\\bgit\\s+commit\\b.*\\$\\(cat\\b.suggestion: Pass the commit message directly with `-m "message"` instead of using `$(cat <<'EOF' ...)`.

\\bgh\\s+pr\\b.*\\$\\(cat\\b.suggestion: Pass arguments directly with `--title "title" --body "body"` instead of using `$(cat <<'EOF' ...)`.
